title: Trace (disambiguation)
content:
'''Trace''' may refer to

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Trace Martez]]''', a [[mechanic]]
*The '''[[Shipwrights' Trace]]''', a [[hyperspace route]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Trace (clone)|Trace]]''', a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]]
*'''[[Trace (Imperial)|Trace]]''', a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]]
*'''[[Trace (SIS)|Trace]]''', an agent of the [[Republic Strategic Information Service]]
*'''[[Trace (Tansarii Point Station)|Trace]]''', a [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]] resident
*'''[[Trace (Deadeyes)|Trace]]''', a member of the [[Deadeyes]]
*'''[[Trace Lyson]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]]
*'''[[Trace Polters]]''', the owner of [[Ma'Haffee Shipyard]]
*'''[[Arvel Trace]]''', the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of [[Sesid/Legends|Sesid]]
*'''[[Hestizo Trace]]''', a member of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Agricultural Corps/Legends|Agricultural Corps]] and sister of Rojo
*'''[[Rojo Trace]]''', a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and brother of Hestizo
*'''Trace''', an alias used by [[Hamo Blastwell]]

===[[Hyperlane]]s===
*The '''[[Askar Trace]]'''
*The '''[[Bakura Trace/Legends|Bakura Trace]]'''
*The '''[[Desevran Trace]]'''
*The '''[[Dustig Trace]]'''
*The '''[[Korphir Trace]]'''
*The '''[[Salin Corridor/Legends|Salin Corridor]]''', originally known as the '''Warriors' Trace'''
*The '''[[Senex Trace]]'''
*The '''[[Shipwrights' Trace/Legends|Shipwrights' Trace]]'''
*The '''[[Silvestri Trace]]'''
*The '''[[Thesme Trace]]'''

==Real world==
*"'''[[Gone with a Trace]]'''", an episode of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''

{{Disambig}}
